Operation 'sendEmail' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate key capabilities. Description lacks critical details about authentication requirements, input schema specifics, response format, and asynchronous delivery behavior. AI agents need to understand that this operation requires authentication, what the SendEmailRequest contains, what response to expect, and that delivery is asynchronous. Enhanced version provides complete context for proper operation selection and usage.

data.current_description: Sends an email message with optional CC, BCC, and attachments.
data.summary_suggestion: Send email message with optional recipients and attachments
data.description_suggestion: Sends an email message to specified recipients with support for CC, BCC, and file attachments. Requires authentication via Bearer token. Accepts SendEmailRequest containing recipient addresses, subject, body content, and optional attachments. Returns a SuccessResponse confirming the email was queued for delivery. Note: This operation queues the email for asynchronous delivery; actual delivery status can be monitored via webhook notifications.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate key capabilities. Description lacks critical details about authentication requirements, input schema specifics, response format, and asynchronous delivery behavior. AI agents need to understand that this operation requires authentication, what the SendEmailRequest contains, what response to expect, and that delivery is asynchronous. Enhanced version provides complete context for proper operation selection and usage.

message: Operation 'addCustomer' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks specificity about required/optional inputs, what is returned, and the side effect of adding the subscriber to the contact list. Enhanced description clarifies input expectations, return value, and operational context for AI agents.

data.current_description: Creates a new customer/subscriber in the OtterText system.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new customer/subscriber in the OtterText system. Accepts customer details including phone number, name, email, and custom attributes via AddCustomerRequest. Returns a success response with the created customer ID. The new subscriber is added to your contact list and can receive SMS messages upon opt-in.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about required/optional inputs, what is returned, and the side effect of adding the subscriber to the contact list. Enhanced description clarifies input expectations, return value, and operational context for AI agents.

data.current_description: Changes the opt-in/opt-out status of a customer for receiving messages.
data.description_suggestion: Changes the opt-in/opt-out status of a customer for receiving SMS messages. Accepts OptinOptoutRequest with customer identifier and desired opt-in status. Returns a success response confirming the status change. This operation controls whether the customer will receive future SMS campaigns and messages.
data.reasoning: Missing clarity on what inputs are required, what the response contains, and the business impact of the status change. Enhanced description specifies input requirements, return value, and clarifies the operational effect on message delivery.

data.current_description: Retrieves the current opt-in status of a customer by phone number.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current opt-in status of a customer by phone number. Accepts phone number as a query parameter. Returns OptinStatusResponse containing the customer's opt-in status and related subscription information. Use this to verify whether a customer is eligible to receive SMS messages before sending campaigns.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail about parameters and response structure. Enhanced description clarifies the query parameter requirement, specifies the response schema, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing customer's profile information including name, email, and custom attributes. Accepts UpdateCustomerRequest with customer identifier and fields to update. Returns a success response confirming the update. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified. Changes take effect immediately for future message sends.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic. Enhanced summary is more specific and action-oriented. Enhanced description clarifies what fields can be updated, supports partial updates, specifies the response, and explains the operational effect for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'sendMessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description mentions scheduling and templates but lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and constraints. Enhanced description clarifies input options (direct message vs template), return value, scheduling capability, and the dependency on opt-in status for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Sends an SMS message to a customer. Can also be used for scheduling messages or sending templates.
data.description_suggestion: Sends an SMS message to a customer immediately or at a scheduled time. Accepts SendMessageRequest with recipient phone number, message content or template ID, and optional scheduling parameters. Returns a success response with message ID and delivery status. Supports direct messages, template-based messages, and scheduled delivery. Message delivery depends on customer opt-in status.
data.reasoning: Description mentions scheduling and templates but lacks specificity about inputs, outputs, and constraints. Enhanced description clarifies input options (direct message vs template), return value, scheduling capability, and the dependency on opt-in status for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Adds or configures a webhook for receiving real-time event notifications.
data.description_suggestion: Adds or configures a webhook endpoint for receiving real-time event notifications from OtterText. Accepts WebhookRequest with webhook URL and event types to subscribe to. Returns a success response with webhook configuration details. Webhooks deliver notifications for events such as message delivery, bounces, and customer opt-in/opt-out changes. Requires HTTPS endpoint.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about what inputs are needed, what events are available, what the response contains, and technical requirements. data.current_description: Retrieves a list of available message templates.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of available message templates for your account. Accepts TemplatesRequest with optional filtering criteria. Returns TemplatesResponse containing an array of Template objects with template ID, name, and content. Use this to discover available templates before sending template-based messages via the sendMessage operation.
